sources.name: Critical Consensus
sources.methodology: Games appearing on at least six separate best-of lists from different established publications.

sources.name: World Video Game Hall of Fame
sources.methodology: Games recognized by The Strong for sustained popularity and influence on games, popular culture, or society.
